blocked.detail: Playwright reads CSS ::before content for 5 pins; needs a browser engine. env-capabilities.json browser=false.
Playwright hover asserts InfoPanel width/height/padding/font; needs a browser engine. env-capabilities.json browser=false.
Cross-origin iframe outline+label; verify method is manual, needs two real origins / browser. env-capabilities.json browser=false.
@media print HUD-hide screenshot diff; needs a browser print engine. env-capabilities.json browser=false.
Playwright integration suite over examples/vite-react; browser binary unavailable. env-capabilities.json browser=false.
Visual-regression screenshot matrix; needs a browser. env-capabilities.json browser=false.
/apex:health-check needs APEX synced to ~/.claude/. env-capabilities.json apex_install=false.

regression_scan.method: Cross-checked every loop.json criteria entry with status=CLOSED against ac-results-R14.json; all 62 verdicts are PASS.

ap006_spot_checks.note: pinscope() returns a Vite plugin with name 'vite-plugin-pinscope', enforce 'pre', and buildStart/transform/buildEnd/transformIndexHtml hooks.

stableKey builds file:line:column; PinMap.getOrAssign returns the existing id for a known key, so two transforms of identical source yield identical ids. Test 'assigns identical ids across two runs of the same source (AC-005)' present.
PinMap.reconcile marks entries whose key was not seen this build with deleted:true; the e_N id is retained, never reused (getOrAssign uses next_id++ only for new keys).
stripPins removes every /\sdata-pin="[^"]*"/g; transformIndexHtml returns stripPins(html) when the plugin is disabled.
dist/ (index.html + assets/) contains 0 files matching the pattern; production build is clean.

parseCommand handles all five SPEC §11 target forms and every operator (set/increment/decrement/add-class/remove-class), throwing typed OperationParseError on malformed input; suite drives >=30 grammar cases (machine: 40 tests).
size-limit has a 'runtime (dev)' entry at the 80 KB SPEC §13 budget; npm run size verified exit 0.
All five apex-skill headings present in framework/apex-skills/pinscope.md.
ui-phase.md contains a '## PINSCOPE INSTRUMENTATION' scaffold step.
Both architect.md and frontend.md reference pinscope in skill-selection logic.
